data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description:
1. CZ: To protect users, we restrict Binance employees from speculating in cryptocurrencies. I am considering buying some local bitcoins.

2. BinaryX officially changed its name to Four. BNX tokens will be exchanged for FOUR at a ratio of 1:1.

3. XRP ETF and Solana ETF applications are officially entered into the US SEC federal register, awaiting further approval.

4. People familiar with the matter: Hong Kong regulators are discussing the launch of cryptocurrency ETF staking.

5. Kaito founder: Staking rewards are online. Locking tokens does not participate in staking. Subsequent HODL scores are related to Kaito Connet voting rights.

6. Binance Alpha adds B3, FLUID, VVV, TOKEN, DRIFT, CPOOL.

7. Kanye West plans to launch YZY tokens, and he will own 70% of the tokens.

8. Matrixport: Bitcoin's rally may be under pressure in the short term, and investors should pay attention to relevant policies of the US Treasury.

9. South African listed company Altvest Capital applies to raise $1,000 10. JPMorgan Chase: The crypto market faces weak demand, and Trump's positive measures may boost the market.

data.title: AscendEX will soon launch Global DePIN Chain (DEEPSEEK)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Global DePIN Chain (DEEPSEEK) at 20:00 on February 21, and open DEEPSEEK/USDT trading pairs, which are now open for deposits.
It is understood that AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is one of the leading and comprehensive trading platforms for Memecoin in the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for online listing based on on-chain data and project background.

data.title: Binance Square launches “Real Data” feature, allowing users to open real-time trading and follow trusted content creators
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On February 21, Binance Square launched a new "Real Data" feature, which aims to enhance the content credibility and community trust of content creators on the Square platform. This feature allows content creators to display their asset distribution, profit and loss ratio and trading feature badges after opening, helping users to choose trustworthy content creators based on real trading data. This feature is only visible to the followers of content creators, further improving the platform's interactivity, content quality and ability to discuss the real market.
Binance co-founder He Yi said: "The "Open Real Trading Data" feature on Binance Square makes the trading community more transparent. I also participated in the product testing of this feature and disclosed my position, which is 89% of BNB. This shows my personal confidence in BNB, and also shows how users can verify portfolios and trading insights through real data, so as to engage in credible and user-centric interactions."

data.title: Bitget will launch BGSOL spot trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget will launch Bitget SOL (BGSOL) in the Solana ecosystem and DeFi area. The recharge channel is now open, and the trading channel will be opened at 18:00 (UTC+8) on February 22.

data.title: KAITO briefly broke through 1.98 USDT, with a market value of US$352 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that KAITO briefly broke through 1.98 USDT, with a 4-hour increase of nearly 20%. It has now fallen back to 1.87 USDT, and its market value is temporarily reported at 352 million US dollars.

data.title: Nano Labs: Plans to raise $5.9 million through private equity transactions and increase Bitcoin holdings to 400
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Nano Labs announced that it has signed a share subscription agreement with certain investors to sell 913,714 shares of the company's Class A common stock in a private placement. The purchase price of each Class A common stock is $6.46, and the total purchase price of the private placement is approximately $5.9 million. In addition, Nano Labs also stated that it has recently increased its holdings of Bitcoin. As of February 21, 2025, it holds a total of approximately 400 Bitcoins, with a current value of approximately $40 million, and an average acquisition cost of approximately $99,500, including transaction fees. (PRnewsWire)

data.title: Encrypted privacy data layer Primus completes $6.5 million in Pre-Seed and Seed rounds of financing, led by VanEck and others
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The encrypted privacy data layer Primus officially announced on the X platform that it has completed a total of US$6.5 million in Pre-Seed and Seed rounds of financing. This round of financing was led by Dispersion Capital, Symbolic Capital, and VanEck, and participated by Samsung Next, Alchemy, Maelstrom, etc. As the missing encryption middle layer between blockchain and applications, Primus will use cryptography technology to solve the core challenges of trust and privacy in the future, ensuring that the interaction in the decentralized ecosystem is safe and reliable. In addition, it will continue to develop zkTLS and zkFHE, allowing users to verify and control any Web data.

data.title: FTX creditor representative: Users in five regions including China are temporarily unable to participate in claims distribution
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sunil, a representative of FTX creditors, posted on the X platform that a large number of bankruptcy complaints came from jurisdictions that were not eligible for FTX distribution, including Russia, China, Egypt, Nigeria, and Ukraine. Among them, the number of Chinese users was the largest, accounting for 8% of the total number of FTX users. FTX is reviewing relevant solutions.
